response.overview: A newsreel from the 1940s summarizing the activities of the 1945 carnivals mentions the coronation of Armandina Dongo as "Queen of Labor" at the Segura Theater and her acceptance speech. It shows the parade of floats and the queens in the new Plaza de Acho, before the gala bullfight featuring Mexican and Peruvian bullfighters. Finally, it mentions the children's dances in Barranco and at the Lawn Tennis Club during the exposition, where the children participated in original and elegant costumes.
response.title: Carnavales 1945
